query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.department, p.research_field, 
  u.image_url as university_image, 
  r.image_url as research_image
FROM professors p
LEFT JOIN university_field_images u ON p.research_field = u.research_field_name AND u.university_name = 'University of Washington'
LEFT JOIN research_field_images r ON p.research_field = r.field_name
WHERE p.name = 'Haicheng Wang'
LIMIT 1;
command:

  r.image_url as research_image
FROM professors p
LEFT JOIN university_field_images u ON p.research_field = u.research_field_name AND u.university_name = 'University of Washington'
LEFT JOIN research_field_images r ON p.research_field = r.field_name
WHERE p.name = 'Haicheng Wang'
LIMIT 1;
